ddls:
CREATE TABLE "delivery_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery schedule */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery schedule (e.g., same-day, next-day) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delivery schedule */,
  "minimum_order_amount" REAL /* Minimum order amount required to qualify for the delivery schedule */,
  "maximum_delivery_distance" REAL /* Maximum distance for the delivery schedule */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the schedule is currently active */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time for delivery (e.g., 2 hours, 1 day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery schedule */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being delivered */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Unique tracking number for the delivery */,
  "delivery_fee" REAL /* Delivery fee for the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "delivery_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific delivery address */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the delivery was made */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Current status of the delivery (e.g., pending, in transit, delivered) */,
  "delivery_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or special instructions for the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_delivery_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_address_id") REFERENCES delivery_addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES delivery_schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer for contact */,
  "preferred_delivery_schedule" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred delivery schedule */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_delivery_schedule FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_delivery_schedule") REFERENCES delivery_schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, logistics manager, customer support agent) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the delivery */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the delivery */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the delivery */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the delivery */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if this is the default delivery address for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
